series_metadata.series_title: ABSTRACT OF ABSTRACT OF REAL & PUBLIC UTILITY PROPERTY
series_metadata.series_description: Combined record of tax valuation on real and public utility property by taxing districts for all 88 counties. Unbound.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Ten years to be kept in the dept. After 11th year to be sent to Archives with dept. retaining ownership and provision made to annually retire the earliest volume to Archives., Paper: Archives
